export class TokenPurchaseOkParser{constructor(){this._tokenId=0;this._diamonds=0;this._activeUntilTs=0;}flush(){this._tokenId=0;this._diamonds=0;this._activeUntilTs=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._tokenId=wrapper.readInt();this._diamonds=wrapper.readInt();this._activeUntilTs=wrapper.readInt();// 0 when token is just added to inventory
return true;}get tokenId(){return this._tokenId;}get diamonds(){return this._diamonds;}get activeUntilTs(){return this._activeUntilTs;}}
